summary: Iteration 34 — Migration v15e (Sijill_Catalogue_Lancement_Mai2026) full validation. Backend: 25/25 pytest PASS against external preview URL. Frontend: /api/site/catalogue shows 22 cards with totals 'PREMIÈRE VAGUE — MAI 2026' / '22 entrées · 22 cours au lancement Mai 2026' + MAI 2026 + SEPT. 2026 date badges. /api/site/cursus shows 7 cursus with dynamic course counts 4/2/5/7/11/1/2 = 32; expanding cursus-sciences-islamiques visually confirms recruiting courses (cours-doxographie, cours-autobiographies) appear greyed-out with PROCHAINEMENT badge while cours-coran + cours-hadith show MAI 2026 badge and cours-historiographie is live.
critical_code_review_comments: Note on review-request wording: the review request states Maïmonide title should be 'La philosophie juive de langue arabe', but the actual stored title is 'La philosophie de Maïmonide' (seed_locked=true, NOT touched by v15e). Migration contract is fully respected (no overwrite of seed_locked titles). If the user wants the title literally changed to 'La philosophie juive de langue arabe', a one-shot manual update is required (v15e by design will not do it). Flagging as info, not a bug.
Migration v15e is non-gated (runs every startup) per the agent_to_agent context — confirmed by startup log line 'Migration v15e: status applied — 32 updated, 0 inserted'. Idempotent and safe.

/api/catalogue exposes the field `recruiting` on every item (default False on launch items). cursus-arts and cursus-sciences-islamiques recruiting=true courses are correctly EXCLUDED from /api/catalogue (they are vision-cible-only) but INCLUDED in /api/courses?cursus_id=... — matching the spec.

Frontend cursus list page uses data-testid='cursus-toggle-cursus-{id}' on the accordion headers (good for tests). The course cards inside the accordion did not have an easy-to-grep slug attribute — recommend adding data-testid='cursus-course-{course_id}' to each card for future automated assertions on grey-out / badge state.

success_rate.frontend: verified visually — catalogue 22 cards + totals OK; cursus dynamic counts OK; recruiting grey-out + PROCHAINEMENT badge OK; MAI 2026 date badges OK

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only assertions against existing seed + v15e migration state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v15e backend state validated: /api/catalogue=22 launch items (all required fields incl. recruiting), /api/cursus=7 with dynamic course_count sum=32, per-cursus counts: histoire=4, theologie=2, sci-isl=5, arts=7, falsafa=11, spir=1, pensees-non-isl=2. Recruiting courses (recruiting=true): cours-urjuza, cours-geographie (arts), cours-doxographie, cours-autobiographies (sci-isl). cours-philo-juive seed_locked=true (title 'La philosophie de Maïmonide' preserved — NOT overwritten). cours-maths-arabes + cours-sciences-naturelles separate, is_launch_catalog=true, coming_soon=true, available_date='mai 2026'. Deactivated: cours-sciences, cours-inclassables, cours-falsafa-persan, cours-falsafa-grands (is_active=false, excluded from catalogue + per-cursus lists). cours-andalus.available_date is null (not 'TEST_date'). Frontend webapp served from /api/site/* — accordion uses data-testid='cursus-toggle-cursus-{id}'. Sciences-islamiques accordion expansion confirmed: PROCHAINEMENT badge + opacity reduction on cours-doxographie + cours-autobiographies cards. cours-coran + cours-hadith display green 'MAI 2026' badge. cours-historiographie is live with 1 module.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — Migration v15e behaves exactly as specified.
